label: Tokens, vocabularies & symbolic units

node.label: Tokens, vocabularies & symbolic units
node.definition: Discrete units convert text, code, actions, images, or audio into sequences a model can consume.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Tokens, vocabularies & symbolic units is modeled as depending on Information theory, Discrete mathematics & logic and feeding downstream nodes such as Multimodal, simulated & streaming data, Self-supervised learning, Masked prediction objectives.
examples: atlas downstream link to Multimodal, simulated & streaming data
atlas downstream link to Self-supervised learning
atlas downstream link to Masked prediction objectives
limitations: Encoding choices can discard information, amplify bias, or make important invariances difficult to learn. Its direct dependencies include Information theory, Discrete mathematics & logic.

dependencies.rationale: Tokens, vocabularies & symbolic units rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Information theory.
Tokens, vocabularies & symbolic units rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Discrete mathematics & logic.
In this atlas graph, Tokens, vocabularies & symbolic units has a `requires` dependency on Programming languages, compilers & type systems with `common` strength.
